description: Clean up dead code, fix inconsistencies, improve documentation, and enhance developer experience in the Nix configuration repository

userStories.title: Remove dead llm-server role
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want to remove the unused llm-server role from bundles.nix so the codebase is cleaner
acceptanceCriteria: llm-server entry removed from bundles.nix roles

userStories.title: Uncomment zero NixOS config in build task
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want the zero NixOS configuration to be tested in CI so all configs are validated
acceptanceCriteria: Line removing zero from nix:build:nixos task removed in devenv.nix

userStories.title: Fix stateVersion type consistency
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want all stateVersion values to use consistent string types across Darwin and NixOS
acceptanceCriteria: flake.nix uses string type for system.stateVersion in mkDarwinHost (change 4 to "4")

userStories.title: Externalize myConfig from mkDarwinHost
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want to move large myConfig blocks out of flake.nix into separate files for better maintainability
acceptanceCriteria: New file targets/wweaver/myconfig.nix created with extraConfig content
New file targets/MegamanX/myconfig.nix created with extraConfig content
flake.nix imports these files instead of inline config

userStories.title: Fix nixpkgs-stable version typo
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want to correct the nixpkgs-stable channel from '25.05' to '24.11' (or appropriate stable)
acceptanceCriteria: flake.nix line 6 uses correct stable channel version
nix flake update && nix flake check --no-build passes

userStories.title: Consolidate overlays into flake.nix
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want to move the minimal overlay from overlays/default.nix directly into flake.nix to reduce file count
acceptanceCriteria: overlays/default.nix content moved inline to flake.nix overlays section

userStories.title: Document llm-server role
userStories.description: As a user, I want documentation for the llm-server role to understand its purpose
acceptanceCriteria: If llm-server is kept, docs/reference/roles.md includes it
If removed, bundles.nix no longer references it

userStories.title: Document jj-autosync in how-to guide
userStories.description: As a user, I want documentation explaining how to use jj-autosync for repository synchronization

userStories.title: Document custom MCP server setup
userStories.description: As a user, I want documentation on how to add custom MCP servers for OpenCode and Claude Code

userStories.title: Document microvm configuration
userStories.description: As a user, I want documentation on how to set up and use microvms
acceptanceCriteria: References devenv tasks for microvm:build and microvm:run

userStories.title: Refactor system:switch task deduplication
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want to extract duplicated hostname-to-config mapping into a shared function
acceptanceCriteria: devenv.nix uses a shared variable/function for hostname mappings
system:switch and cachix:push tasks use shared mapping

userStories.title: Refactor cachix:push tasks deduplication
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want to extract duplicated cachix authentication logic into a helper
acceptanceCriteria: cachix:push and cachix:push:all use shared authentication helper

userStories.title: Remove redundant devenv aliases
userStories.description: As a user, I want fewer redundant shell aliases for clarity
acceptanceCriteria: Removed duplicate aliases: dt, dtr (keep one), t (keep)
Kept: switch, q, b, i, tf

userStories.title: Add ci:local alias for devenv
userStories.description: As a user, I want a quick alias to run platform-appropriate CI checks
acceptanceCriteria: devenv.nix enterShell includes alias for ci:local

userStories.title: Add hostname-to-config reference
userStories.description: As a user, I want a quick reference for which hostnames map to which configurations
acceptanceCriteria: README.md or AGENTS.md includes hostname mapping table
Table includes: wweaver, MegamanX, drlight, zero, core

userStories.title: Fix bundles.nix package pattern consistency
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want consistent package declaration patterns in bundles.nix
acceptanceCriteria: All packages use pkgs. prefix consistently

userStories.title: Add permittedInsecurePackages audit task
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want a task to audit and clean up insecure packages
acceptanceCriteria: Task checks for outdated versions in permittedInsecurePackages
Task provides guidance on updating/removing entries

userStories.title: Migrate jj skill to internal source
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want the jj skill to use internal path for better maintainability
acceptanceCriteria: jj skill source changed from external/ to internal/
File moved from skills/external/jj to modules/home-manager/skills/internal/jj

userStories.title: Add health check task for Ollama
userStories.description: As a user, I want a task to check if Ollama service is running
acceptanceCriteria: Task provides clear output on service status

userStories.title: Improve docs-update.sh error handling
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want the docs-update script to handle nix eval failures gracefully
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/docs-update.sh has better error handling for nix eval
Script exits with clear error message on failure
Script works when nix is not available in PATH

userStories.title: Remove go-task migration comment
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want to remove outdated migration comments from devenv.nix
acceptanceCriteria: Comment about go-task removal cleaned up in devenv.nix line 25
Comment about dagger removal cleaned up in devenv.nix

userStories.title: Add scheduled flake lock update workflow
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want automated flake.lock updates on a schedule
acceptanceCriteria: Workflow creates PR automatically on changes

userStories.title: Add secret scanning to CI
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want to add secret scanning to prevent accidental credential commits
acceptanceCriteria: gitleaks or similar tool added to pr-validation.yml

userStories.title: Fix superpowersPath type in options
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want to fix the type signature for superpowersPath to accept flake inputs properly
acceptanceCriteria: options.nix superpowersPath uses correct type for flake input

userStories.title: Add integration test for agent skills
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want an integration test to verify agent skills install correctly
acceptanceCriteria: devenv task agent-skills:validate actually validates skills
Task checks SKILL.md files exist for installed skills

userStories.title: Simplify mkBundleModule merging logic
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want to simplify the complex bundle merging logic in flake.nix for easier debugging
acceptanceCriteria: mkBundleModule logic extracted to helper function or let block
Code is more readable with comments

userStories.title: Run final validation
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want to run the full CI pipeline to verify all changes work together
